title: Smoky Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with smoky chicken, served with velvety sauce, and a side of stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the snow peas and garlic to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the velvety sauce, soy sauce, and smoked paprika.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is coated.
Serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
Serve over steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
